MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-13-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT THERECE LEBRANE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT LEBRANE, THERECE M.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-27-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT THERECE LEBRANE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE.
